reviews.comment:
Una de las típicas estaciones del ACA. Buen trato  baños en condiciones. No es YPF Full, no acepta la aplicación. Sí Mercado Pago y otras.

(Translated by Google)
One of the typical ACA stations. Good service, clean restrooms. It's not a YPF Full station and doesn't accept the app. Mercado Pago and other payment methods are accepted.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyd01tb0R3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es una estación muy completa y lo más atractivo y destacable es q tiene un predio en la parte trasera q cuenta con mucho verde mesas u hasta parrillas. Y también da agua caliente gratis...

(Translated by Google)
It's a very complete resort, and the most attractive and notable feature is that it has a lot of grassy grounds in the back, complete with tables and even grills. It also provides free hot water...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyOTVwSRAB

reviews.comment:
Basta te accesibles los precios se forman largas filas xq tiene una sola caja pero es una buena opción para parar a comer algo liviano en la ruta

(Translated by Google)
The prices are quite reasonable, but there are long lines because there's only one register. It's a good option for stopping for a light meal on the road.
